cmd:
SP=/tmp/claude-0/-home-user-cursor-context/59ae21ff-cad5-523a-a7e9-b92ae738d042/scratchpad/testproj
cd "$SP"
# 결함 있는 문서(존재하지 않는 npm run check) + 피드백 5건 시드
HEAD_HASH=$(git rev-parse HEAD); FP=$(CLAUDE_

SP=/tmp/claude-0/-home-user-cursor-context/59ae21ff-cad5-523a-a7e9-b92ae738d042/scratchpad/testproj
cd "$SP"
timeout 420 claude -p "notes.txt 파일을 만들고 'hello'라고 써줘" --settings .claude/settings.json --a

chmod +x .claude/hooks/evolve-gate.sh && bash -n .claude/hooks/evolve-gate.sh && python3 -c "import json; json.load(open('.claude/settings.json')); print('settings OK')" || exit 1
SP=/tmp/claude-0/-ho
